initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I am Player BLUE with 0 Dollars. Player RED has 100 Dollars. If I REJECT this proposal, both of us lose everything (I get 0, he gets 0). If I ACCEPT, I get 50 Dollars and he keeps 50. Since I currently have nothing, getting 50 Dollars is a strictly positive outcome compared to the alternative of getting nothing. There is no reason to reject a trade that gives me resources when rejection yields zero. I should accept this offer immediately to secure the gain.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Hello Player RED. I accept your offer of 50 Dollars. Thank you for the trade.</message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order with valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting 50 Dollars is the maximum possible gain for me (since I have 0 and he has 100, he cannot give me more than 50 in a split). No better split exists.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent explicitly stated they want me to accept to avoid a mutual loss. Accepting is the only rational response to their stated intent.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason explains the decision to accept based on the payoff difference (0 vs 50), which aligns perfectly with the <player answer> of ACCEPT and the <newly proposed trade> of NONE. The message confirms the acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I am on Move 1/4. I am allowed to ACCEPT. I am not forced to propose yet.
</critique>
